calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Successor Trustee Resignation
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And For Instructions (Original Petition Filed In Consolidated Case Ptr-21-304728 On Aug. 20, 2021)
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Datu, via ZOOM, for Andrew Babin, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel of its tentative ruling to grant the PC 850 portion of his petition and order distribution to Richard's Estate but deny the additional relief for Instructions. Counsel offers brief testimony and submits on the papers.

The Petition Confirming Trust Assets, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And For Instructions (Original Petition Filed In Consolidated Case Pr-21-304728 On Aug. 20, 2021)
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Mar-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Instructions
Off Calendar May-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Datu, via ZOOM, counsel for Andrew Babin, Petitioner.

Counsel begins by reporting that he is considering filing a Heggstad petition to amend Trust. After additional discussion, the court advises counsel that it is considering appointing Andrew Babin as Successor Trustee and to dismiss additional requests without prejudice, and to set the minimum bond amount.

The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee and for Instructions is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Instructions
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Continued To May-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Continued To Apr-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Continued To Mar-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-19-2021 Continued To Mar-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Datu appeared by telephone for Andrew Babin (Petitioner).

Mr. Datu explained how the property is titled, stated that he tried to do an 850 petition but the Court declined to rule indicating that the property needed to be taken out of the trust, that he is trying to clean up title and that his Client indicated to him that the property is only worth $1,285.00, but it is something that the Client wants to do. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to do an ex parte petition to correct the caption of this case to the Charles L. Weyro Testamentary Trust for the benefit of Myrtle Weyro. Discussion was held as to whether an 850 petition is needed. The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee and for Instructions is continued to March 2, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Instructions
Off Calendar Dec-22-2020 Continued To Jan-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Continued To Dec-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
